tour.title: Project Workflow
tour.description: Start with the project rules, source-of-truth files, and task tracking before changing code.

tour.title: Kalman Backend State Pipeline
tour.description: Follow how live records are ingested, filtered, persisted, and exposed through Django.

tour.title: AMPC Integration Layer
tour.description: Review the Django service boundary that scopes greenhouses, reads Kalman state, calls MPC, and records recommendations.

tour.title: MPC Controller Package
tour.description: Inspect the standalone MPC/AMPC package used by the Django control integration.

tour.title: Dashboard Contract
tour.description: Check the frontend API client and types that consume backend run and AMPC recommendation contracts.

tour.title: Validation Surface
tour.description: Use the backend and MPC tests to verify controller safety, ownership scoping, and API behavior.
